welcome_offer.description: As-high-as offer: earn up to 100,000 Membership Rewards points after $8,000 in purchases within the first 6 months. Welcome offers vary and applicant may not be eligible.

earning_rates.notes: Restaurants worldwide, on up to $50,000 in purchases per calendar year, then 1X
U.S. supermarkets, on up to $25,000 in purchases per calendar year, then 1X
Prepaid hotels booked through AmexTravel.com or Amex Travel App
Flights booked through AmexTravel.com, Amex Travel App, or directly with airlines
Prepaid car rentals through AmexTravel.com / Amex Travel App and cruises booked and paid through AmexTravel.com

recurring_credits.merchant_scope: Grubhub/Seamless, Buffalo Wild Wings, Five Guys, The Cheesecake Factory, Wonder
U.S. Uber rides or Uber Eats after adding Gold Card to Uber account
U.S. Resy restaurants / eligible Resy purchases

open_questions: DoC line 9 says current public 'up to 100,000' requires $6k spend, but issuer rendered page says $8,000. Since issuer is canonical, candidate uses $8,000 and flags DoC/USCCG as stale/conflicting on spend requirement.

Existing OpenCard data includes Centurion Lounge / Priority Pass and Marriott/Hilton Gold status under travel_benefits; no such benefits appeared in the current official Gold page snapshot and should be removed or verified separately.
Existing OpenCard data has conflicting THC/FHR flags: fhr_thc says FHR false/THC true, hotel_program says FHR true/THC false. Candidate uses official-visible The Hotel Collection only.
